features.name: wildcard port connection with tristate comparison
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using wildcard port connection (.*) where the connected signal is compared against 'z using !== or === operator

features.name: top-level IO with downstream tristate comparison
features.description: Code should include a top-level module port that is passed via wildcard connection to a submodule performing a !== 'z or === 'z comparison, causing incorrect tristate inference
